hero.review1_text: Incredible experience. The staff was very friendly and the food was delicious. We will definitely come back.
hero.review1_response: Thank you so much, Maria! We're glad you enjoyed the experience. Our team works every day to make every visit special. See you soon!

hero.review2_response: Thanks, Carlos, for your rating and your words. We take note of the wait times to keep improving. Hope to see you again soon!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HolaRevi and review automation.
faq.a1: Yes. You can enable automatic mode and HolaRevi will post every response as soon as the review arrives. You can also choose review mode: AI generates the response and you approve it before posting.
faq.q2: Does it work with my Google Business profile?
faq.a2: Yes. HolaRevi connects directly with Google Business Profile to read reviews and post responses on your behalf.
faq.q3: Can I control the tone and style of the responses?
faq.a3: Yes. You configure the tone, templates, and brand instructions. Responses always sound like your business, not a bot.
faq.a4: You can respond to old reviews in addition to automating new ones. The goal is to recover your reputation without massive manual effort.
faq.q5: Does it work for multiple locations?
faq.a5: Yes. The platform is designed for multi-location businesses: unified dashboard, comparisons, and per-location controls. Limits depend on your plan.
faq.q6: Do I need a card for the free trial?
faq.a6: It depends on current configuration. If requested, it's to prevent interruption after the trial ends. You won't be charged during the trial period.

problem.title: Most businesses ignore their reviews
problem.subtitle: And that has a real cost: less trust, worse ranking, and customers going to the competition.

c1.title: No response
c1.desc: On average, more than half of Google reviews go unanswered. Each one is a lost opportunity.

c2.title: Late response
c2.desc: When businesses do respond, it's often too late. The customer has already moved on.

c3.title: Inconsistent tone
c3.desc: Every employee writes differently. The result is a fragmented and unprofessional brand image.

solution.title: Your reviews, responded automatically
solution.subtitle: HolaRevi uses AI to generate personalized responses to every Google review. It understands your business context, maintains your brand tone, and posts without you lifting a finger.

c1.title: Automatic Responses
c1.desc: AI reads the review and generates a coherent response instantly.

c2.title: Brand Tone
c2.desc: Configure the style once. Every response sounds like your business.

c3.title: Review Analytics
c3.desc: Trend, sentiment, and evolution of your reputation over time.

c4.title: Multi-location
c4.desc: Manage multiple locations from a unified dashboard.

points.p1: AI-generated responses, personalized for every review
points.p2: Automatic publishing to Google Business Profile
points.p4: Review mode: approve before posting if you prefer
points.p5: Works 24/7, even when your team is away

how.title: Up and running in less than 10 minutes
how.subtitle: Three simple steps. No technicians. No complex setups.

step1.title: Connect your Google Business
step1.desc: Link your Google Business Profile in one click. HolaRevi starts reading your reviews instantly.

step2.title: Set your brand tone
step2.desc: Tell us how you want to sound: formal, friendly, witty... AI learns and keeps that tone in every response.

step3.title: AI responds for you
step3.desc: Every new review receives a personalized response, published automatically. You see everything in the dashboard.

benefits.title: The impact on your business is immediate
benefits.subtitle: Better reputation, more trust, more sales. No extra manual work.

b1.title: Better Google Ranking
b1.desc: Google rewards businesses that actively respond to their reviews.

b2.title: Higher Average Rating
b2.desc: Responding well to negative reviews turns criticism into trust.

b3.title: Higher Customer Engagement
b3.desc: A customer who receives a response is more likely to return and recommend.

b4.title: Hours of Saved Labor
b4.desc: Your team stops managing reviews manually. AI does it for you.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business size. All include our leading AI technology.

testimonials.title: Real results from local businesses
testimonials.subtitle: From restaurants to clinics. The result is the same: more reputation, less work.
testimonials.googleSubtitle: Real Google Maps reviews and the replies that were published with HolaRevi.

t1.text: Before, it took us days to respond. Now every review gets a response in minutes, with the exact tone we want. Our average rating has increased by half a point in two months.
t1.author: Operations Manager, Restaurant Chain

t2.text: We have 4 clinics and managing reviews was impossible. HolaRevi does it alone. We only review negative ones before publishing.
t2.author: Director, Private Clinics Group

t3.text: The hotel always had good reviews but few responses. Since using HolaRevi, we respond to 100% and customers notice.
t3.author: Manager, Boutique Hotel

extraSolutions.title: Need more than review automation?
extraSolutions.subtitle: HolaRevi focuses on review automation. For businesses with more complex needs, we offer additional custom solutions.
extraSolutions.disclaimer: These solutions are not part of the standard product and require contacting the team.

s1.title: Automated High-Conversion Websites
s1.desc: Websites designed to convert visitors into customers. Optimized, fast, and connected to your Google reviews to build trust from the first second.

s2.title: Advanced Automation Infrastructure

restaurant: The food was cold and they took a long time to serve us. Not coming back.
Incredible experience, the steak was spectacular. The waiter Juan treated us perfectly.
Nice place but noisy. The pizza is okay.
hotel: The room smelled like smoke and the air conditioning didn't work.
Incredible views and very complete breakfast. We will definitely repeat.
Close to the center but the beds are a bit hard.
gym: Too many people at 6 PM, it's impossible to train.
The instructors are very professional and the machines are new.
Great atmosphere, although more yoga classes are needed.
clinic: They called me an hour late for my appointment without apologizing.
Dr. Garcia is an eminence, he explained everything to me with a lot of patience.
Clean facilities but difficult to park in the area.
nail_beauty: My polish chipped after two days. Very disappointed.
The best nail design I've ever had. Very careful.
Nice place, but a bit expensive for what it is.
car_repair: They gave me one price and then charged me double for 'extras'.
Fast and honest. They explained the breakdown with photos.
Good service, although it took a day longer than expected.
retail: The clerk was very rude when I wanted to return a garment.
They have an incredible variety and helped me choose the perfect gift.
Beautiful store, although somewhat messy during sales.
cafe: The coffee was burnt and the pastry from yesterday. I don't recommend it.
They have the best cheesecake in town. Cozy place.
Good place to work, although the wifi fails sometimes.
vet: Cold treatment and it seemed very expensive for a simple consultation.
They saved my dog, I will be eternally grateful to the team.
Good professionals, although there is usually a long wait.
other: They didn't answer my call all day.
Exceptional service, they solved my problem instantly.

restaurant: We deeply regret that your experience was not as expected. We take note of the food temperature and service to improve. We hope you give us another chance.
What a joy to read this! Thank you very much for your words about Juan and our kitchen. We work with enthusiasm for moments like this. See you soon!
Thanks for your visit. We're glad you enjoyed the pizzas. We will take measures to try to dampen the noise during peak hours. Best regards!
hotel: We apologize for the state of the room and the AC failure. We have reviewed our cleaning and maintenance protocol. We hope to compensate you in the future.
Thank you very much! We love knowing that you enjoyed the views and our breakfast. It's a pleasure to have guests like you. See you next time.
Thanks for your feedback. We're glad the location was to your liking. We take note of the firmness of the mattresses for our future renovations.
gym: Hi. We are aware of the influx at peak hours and are working to optimize capacity for your comfort. Thanks for the feedback!
Thank you very much for valuing our facilities and the team! It motivates us a lot to keep offering the best for your workouts.
Thanks! We're glad you like the atmosphere. We are reviewing the directed activity schedule to add more yoga sessions soon.
clinic: We are very sorry for the wait. Sometimes emergencies delay the schedule, but we should have notified you. We will work on improving our communication.
Thank you very much for trusting Dr. Garcia and our team. We're glad to know you felt well attended to. Your health is our priority.
Thanks for your review. We're glad the facilities are to your liking. Unfortunately, parking in the area is limited, we recommend the nearby public parking.
nail_beauty: We are very sorry for what happened. Please contact us to fix it at no cost. We guarantee the durability of our work and want you to be satisfied.
Thank you so much! We love that you like our work. We put a lot of detail into each design. See you soon!
Thanks for your visit. We use premium long-lasting products to ensure the best result, hence our prices. Best regards!
car_repair: We regret the confusion with the budget. We always try to report any unforeseen event. We will review your case internally.
Thank you for your trust! Transparency is key for us. We're glad the car turned out perfect. Have a good trip!
Thanks for valuing us. We always try to meet deadlines, but we prefer to ensure the quality of the fix. Thanks for your patience!
retail: We deeply regret the treatment received, it's not our standard of service. We will talk with the staff so it doesn't happen again. Apologies!
Great! We love helping you find the ideal gift. Thanks for choosing us and for your kind review.
Thanks for letting us know. Sales are intense, but we will work on maintaining order so that your purchase is more comfortable.
cafe: We are very sorry for your bad experience. We will review the coffee machine calibration and the freshness of our pastries immediately. Thanks!
Thank you very much! Our cheesecake is the star of the house. We're glad you felt comfortable in our corner.
Thanks for the feedback. We are reviewing the router to ensure a stable connection for those who come to work with us.
vet: We regret that you felt that way. Our prices reflect the technology and professionalism dedicated to each pet. However, we will review your case.
Stories like yours are what give meaning to our work. We are very glad your dog is well. Big hug!
Thanks for trusting us. We try to dedicate the necessary time to each patient, which sometimes causes waits. Thanks for understanding!
other: Sorry for the inconvenience. We've had a technical problem with the line, but it's already solved. If you leave us a contact, we'll call you.
Thank you very much for your rating! We strive to give fast and effective solutions. A pleasure to help you.
Thanks for your review. We're glad to have met your expectations. Best regards!

termsPage.title: Terms and Conditions — HolaRevi
termsPage.intro1: Welcome to HolaRevi. These Terms and Conditions (the "Terms") govern access to and use of our website, dashboard, APIs, automations and any other associated service (collectively, the "Service"). By signing up for, accessing or using the Service, you fully accept these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
termsPage.intro2: If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must refrain from using the Service. Use of the Service constitutes express and binding acceptance of these conditions.
termsPage.s1p1: HolaRevi is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform that provides assistance, automation and content generation tools focused on managing the online reputation of local businesses, mainly in connection with reviews published on third-party platforms such as Google. HolaRevi makes technical functionalities available; it does not provide legal, commercial, tax, reputational or professional advisory services of any kind.
termsPage.s2item1: Be at least 18 years old, or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher.
termsPage.s2item2: Have legal capacity and the necessary authority to contractually bind the business or entity you connect to the platform.
termsPage.s2item3: Accept these Terms, our Privacy Policy and the policies of any third parties with which the Service interoperates.
termsPage.s3p1: Through HolaRevi, and depending on the plan you have contracted, you may:
termsPage.s3item1: Connect one or more Google Business Profiles or other accounts you legitimately manage.
termsPage.s3item2: View, organise and filter reviews and associated metrics within the HolaRevi dashboard.
termsPage.s3item3: Generate response drafts using artificial intelligence models, configurable by tone and language.
termsPage.s3item4: Publish responses manually or, if you expressly enable it, through automated publishing rules.
termsPage.s3item5: Access analytics, dashboards, alerts and additional reputation management tools.
termsPage.s3p2: The Service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. HolaRevi may add, modify, limit, suspend or withdraw functionalities at any time for technical, operational, legal, security or commercial reasons, without this giving rise to any right to compensation for the User.
termsPage.s4item1: Maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and any access tokens associated with your account.
termsPage.s4item2: All activity carried out from or through your account, even if performed by a third party with or without your authorisation, except to the extent the law requires otherwise.
termsPage.s4item3: Ensuring that your account and business information is truthful, accurate and kept up to date.
termsPage.s4p2: You must notify us without undue delay of any unauthorised access, suspected security incident or misuse of your account.
termsPage.s5p1: By using HolaRevi, you agree to:
termsPage.s5item1: Connect only profiles, accounts or locations you are legitimately authorised to manage.
termsPage.s5item2: Use the Service in compliance at all times with applicable law, including data protection, consumer, advertising and competition rules, as well as Google's policies and those of any other integrated platform.
termsPage.s5item3: Not use the Service to publish, generate or distribute content that is illegal, false, misleading, defamatory, abusive, discriminatory, offensive or that infringes the rights of third parties.
termsPage.s5item4: Not perform reverse engineering, abusive scraping, attacks, attempts to circumvent technical limits or any other interference with the Service or its infrastructure.
termsPage.s5item5: Review, validate and, where appropriate, modify any content or response suggested by the AI before publishing it, especially when dealing with sensitive or negative reviews or those with legal, medical, financial or reputational implications.
termsPage.s5note: You are the sole and ultimate party responsible for any content published through your account, whether written by you, by your team or suggested by the Service's AI models. HolaRevi acts solely as a technical support tool; any publication is deemed made under your sole responsibility.
termsPage.s6p1: HolaRevi is offered primarily as a paid subscription.
termsPage.s6item1: The applicable prices, plans and conditions are those indicated at the time of contracting or on the price page in force.

privacyPage.title: HOLAREVI — PRIVACY POLICY
privacyPage.intro1: This Privacy Policy explains how HolaRevi ("we", "our") collects, uses, stores, shares and protects the personal data of Service users (the "User") and of individuals whose data is processed through it. It includes, among others, data obtained through the Google APIs and other integrated services.
privacyPage.intro2: By using HolaRevi, signing up, connecting your Google account or other services, or providing data to the platform, you accept the processing described in this Policy. This Policy must be read together with the Service's Terms and Conditions.
privacyPage.intro3: If you have any questions, you can contact us at
privacyPage.s1p1: HolaRevi is a SaaS platform focused on review management and online reputation for local businesses, based in Barcelona, Spain.
privacyPage.s1address: Carrer de Ramon Llull, 495, 08930 Sant Adrià de Besòs, Barcelona, Spain
privacyPage.s2_1Title: 2.1. Data the User provides to us
privacyPage.s2_1item1: Identification and contact data of the User: first name, last name, email address, phone number and language.
privacyPage.s2_1item2: Business or entity data being managed: name, location, sector, branches, website, commercial identifiers.
privacyPage.s2_1item3: Subscription and billing data, securely managed by our payment providers (such as Stripe).
privacyPage.s2_1item4: Communications the User sends us via email, chat, contact forms or support channels.
privacyPage.s2_2Title: 2.2. Data obtained through the Google APIs
privacyPage.s2_2p1: When the User signs in with Google and grants the corresponding permissions, HolaRevi may access the following data:
privacyPage.s2_2gbpIntro: For each location the User authorises:
privacyPage.s2_2gbp1: Business name, address, phone, categories and profile attributes.
privacyPage.s2_2gbp2: Reviews (text, rating, language, date and associated metadata).
privacyPage.s2_2gbp3: Reviewer names as provided by Google.
privacyPage.s2_2gbp4: Existing replies left by the User as the owner.
privacyPage.s2_2gbp6: OAuth tokens necessary to access, query and, where applicable, publish responses on behalf of the User.
privacyPage.s2_2not5: Any other Google product or data outside the scopes expressly authorised by the User.
privacyPage.s3p1: Data obtained from the Google APIs is used exclusively to provide HolaRevi's core functionality, in particular to:
privacyPage.s3item1: Import and keep the User's Google Business Profile reviews up to date.
privacyPage.s3item2: Analyse sentiment, language, topics and review patterns for the User's internal management purposes.
privacyPage.s3item3: Generate response drafts using AI and allow editing and review by the User.
privacyPage.s3item4: Publish responses as the owner only when the User explicitly requests it manually or has expressly enabled automatic publication.
privacyPage.s3item5: Provide analytics, dashboards, alerts and reports within the User's account.
privacyPage.s3item6: Handle support requests, diagnostics and incident resolution.
privacyPage.s3not1: Use data obtained from the Google APIs for advertising purposes.
privacyPage.s3not2: Sell or transfer Google data to third parties for their own commercial purposes.
privacyPage.s3not3: Use Google data to train general AI models unrelated to providing the Service to the User.
privacyPage.s3compliance: HolaRevi's use of information received from the Google APIs adheres to the
privacyPage.s3complianceLink: Google API Services User Data Policy
privacyPage.s4Title: 4. How we use other personal data
privacyPage.s4p1: We process non-Google personal data for the following purposes:
privacyPage.s4item1: To create, administer and maintain the User's account and workspace.
privacyPage.s4item2: To authenticate logins, manage sessions, prevent fraud and protect the security of the Service.
privacyPage.s4item3: To process payments, subscriptions, invoices and accounting and tax obligations.
privacyPage.s4item4: To communicate service information, technical changes, legal notices, support and, where appropriate, commercial communications about similar products.
privacyPage.s4item5: To analyse use of the Service in order to maintain, improve, debug and optimise its performance, security and availability.
privacyPage.s4legal: Legal bases (GDPR): performance of the contract entered into with the User; compliance with legal obligations; HolaRevi's legitimate interests in operating, improving and securing the Service; and the User's consent where necessary, particularly for commercial communications and certain cookies or similar technologies.
privacyPage.s5p1: We only share data with service providers strictly necessary to operate HolaRevi, including:
privacyPage.s5item2: AI model providers used to generate response drafts and other content.
privacyPage.s5item4: Email delivery, transactional messaging and support providers.
privacyPage.s5item5: Usage analytics, monitoring, error logging and observability tools.
privacyPage.s5p2: These providers act, where applicable, as data processors, under contracts and confidentiality and security commitments aligned with applicable law. Each provider may apply its own terms and privacy policies, beyond HolaRevi's control.
privacyPage.s5never1: Sells personal data to third parties.
privacyPage.s5never2: Shares Google data for marketing or advertising purposes.
privacyPage.s5never3: Allows third parties to use User data to train AI models unrelated to providing the Service.
privacyPage.s6p1: HolaRevi applies reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect data, including:
privacyPage.s6item2: Encrypted storage for sensitive data, such as tokens and credentials.
privacyPage.s6item3: Role-based access controls to production systems.
privacyPage.s6item4: Cloud infrastructure with standard security and resilience practices.
privacyPage.s6item5: Monitoring of access and security events.
privacyPage.s6p2: No system is entirely foolproof. HolaRevi cannot guarantee absolute security and shall not be liable for security incidents arising from causes outside its reasonable control, without prejudice to legal obligations directly applicable to it.
privacyPage.s7_1p1: We keep data for as long as necessary for the purposes described:
privacyPage.s7_1item1: While the User's account is active and the contract is in force.
privacyPage.s7_1item2: For a reasonable period after cancellation (typically 30-90 days) for operational, backup and compliance reasons.
privacyPage.s7_2p1: You can request deletion of your data at any time by writing to
privacyPage.s7_2p2: Following a deletion request or account closure:
privacyPage.s7_2item1: We will revoke the Google API tokens associated with the account.
privacyPage.s7_2item2: We will delete or anonymise stored review and reply data, to the extent technically possible and compatible with legal obligations.
privacyPage.s7_2item3: We will delete the personal account information, except for any data we are legally required to retain (for example, accounting records).
privacyPage.s8p1: If you are located in the EU/EEA, you may exercise the following rights over your personal data at any time:
privacyPage.s8item1: Access to the personal data we process about you.
privacyPage.s8item2: Rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacyPage.s8item3: Erasure ("right to be forgotten"), where applicable.
privacyPage.s8item4: Restriction of or objection to processing.
privacyPage.s8item6: Withdrawal of consent given, without retroactive effect.
privacyPage.s8p2: To exercise these rights, send your request to
privacyPage.s8p3: For security reasons, we may ask you to verify your identity. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (in Spain, the Spanish Data Protection Agency).
privacyPage.s9p1: Some of our providers may process data outside the European Economic Area (for example, in the United States).
privacyPage.s9p2: In such cases, we apply appropriate safeguards under the GDPR, which may include:
privacyPage.s9item1: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission.
privacyPage.s9item2: Data processing agreements and supplementary measures where necessary.
privacyPage.s10p1: HolaRevi is intended for professionals and businesses, not for individuals under 16, and does not knowingly collect data from minors.
privacyPage.s10p2: If we detect that data from a minor has been collected without an appropriate legal basis, we will delete it without undue delay.
privacyPage.s11p1: HolaRevi's use of information received from the Google APIs adheres to the
privacyPage.s11link: Google API Services User Data Policy
privacyPage.s11note: This statement is included as required by Google for OAuth verification.
privacyPage.s12p1: HolaRevi may amend this Privacy Policy at any time, particularly to reflect legal, technical or operational changes.
privacyPage.s12p2: Material changes will be communicated through the Service, by email or by other reasonable means. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this document.
privacyPage.s12p3: The current version will always be available at:
privacyPage.s13p1: For any matter relating to privacy or data protection, you can contact us:
privacyPage.s4item6: To comply with legal obligations, respond to requests from competent authorities and to bring or defend legal claims.
privacyPage.s7_1item3: For the legal periods that apply (for example, retention of invoices and accounting or tax records).

googlePermissions.title: How HolaRevi Uses Your Google Business Profile Data
googlePermissions.intro: HolaRevi connects to your Google Business Profile to help you manage and reply to your reviews quickly and consistently using AI. This page explains what data we access, how we use it, and how you stay in control.
googlePermissions.s1p1: When you connect your Google account to HolaRevi, we request specific permissions related to your Google Business Profile.
googlePermissions.s1item1Title: View your Google Business Profile information
googlePermissions.s1item1a: Business name, categories, and public details
googlePermissions.s1item2Title: View your business reviews and existing replies
googlePermissions.s1item2d: Reviewer's display name (as provided by Google)
googlePermissions.s1item3Title: Create and update replies to reviews on your behalf
googlePermissions.s1item3a: When you approve a reply inside HolaRevi
googlePermissions.s1item3b: Or when you enable auto-replies (if you choose to do so)
googlePermissions.s1note: We do not request access to Gmail, Google Drive, Google Calendar, or any other unrelated Google products.
googlePermissions.s2Title: 2. How We Use Your Google Data
googlePermissions.s2p1: HolaRevi uses your Google Business Profile data to:
googlePermissions.s2item1: Display all your reviews in the HolaRevi dashboard
googlePermissions.s2item2: Analyze the sentiment and rating of your reviews
googlePermissions.s2item3: Generate AI-powered reply suggestions in your chosen tone and language
googlePermissions.s2item4: Post replies to reviews when you approve or when auto-replies are enabled
googlePermissions.s2note: We only use your Google data to provide the review management features you request. We do not use it for unrelated purposes, and we do not sell your data.
googlePermissions.s3Title: 3. How We Store and Protect Your Data
googlePermissions.s3store2: Reviews and replies required to show your history in the dashboard
googlePermissions.s3store3: Aggregated analytics about reviews and replies
googlePermissions.s3protect2: Limiting access to authorized personnel and systems
googlePermissions.s3protect3: Monitoring access and maintaining logs for security
googlePermissions.s3p3: We keep your data only for as long as necessary to provide the Service or as required by law. For more detail, see our
googlePermissions.s4p1: We may share some data with service providers that help us operate HolaRevi, such as:
googlePermissions.s4item2: AI providers for generating reply suggestions
googlePermissions.s4note: These providers are only allowed to use the data to provide their services to us and must protect it appropriately. We do not sell your Google data or share it with advertisers.
googlePermissions.s5Title: 5. Your Control and How to Disconnect HolaRevi
googlePermissions.s5p1: You remain in full control of your Google account and data.
googlePermissions.s5can1: Disconnect HolaRevi from your Google account at any time from your Google Account settings under "Security" → "Third-party access", or
googlePermissions.s5can2: Contact us at info@holarevi.com if you need help disconnecting or deleting stored data
googlePermissions.s5p3: After you revoke access, HolaRevi will no longer:
googlePermissions.s5revoke3: Access your Google Business Profile data going forward
googlePermissions.s5p4: You can also request deletion of your account and associated data from our systems, subject to legal and billing requirements.
googlePermissions.s6p1: HolaRevi uses your Google data in line with:
googlePermissions.s6item1: Google API Services User Data Policy
googlePermissions.s6p2: We only request the minimum permissions needed to provide our core features and manage your reviews.
googlePermissions.s7p1: If you have any questions about how HolaRevi uses your Google data or permissions, please contact us:

t1.text: Before, it took us days to respond. Now every review gets a response in minutes, with the exact tone we want. Our average rating has increased by half a point in two months.

seo.description: The NFC stand that 5× your Google reviews. No apps, no QR codes. Launch preorder -75% — only first 100 units. Free shipping included.

t1.quote: We went from 2 reviews a month to 18 in just 3 weeks. Customers try it without us saying a word.

t2.quote: I wanted something professional for the front desk and this stand fits perfectly. It's a brand detail guests notice.

faq.title: Questions answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before reserving your unit.
faq.q1: Does it work on all phones?
faq.a1: Yes. Compatible with iPhone 7 or newer and virtually every Android with NFC (most phones since 2018). Customer just taps the stand — that's it.
faq.a2: No. Neither you nor your customers need anything. The customer taps and your Google Reviews page opens directly.
faq.a3: We ship the stand pre-configured with the link to your Google Business. You just place it on the counter. If you need help, we walk you through a free video call.
faq.q4: When will I get my order?
faq.a4: Preorders ship starting Q1 2026. We'll email you the tracking number. Free shipping (5-7 business days within the EU and US).
faq.a5: Yes. The stand is built in premium acrylic and the NFC chip is durable. If you change your Google Business, we reprogram it remotely at no cost.
faq.a6: You have a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, we refund the full amount, no questions asked.
faq.q7: Can I customize it with my logo?
faq.a7: Yes. Every stand is customized with your logo, brand colors and business name. You upload your logo in the preorder form.

finalCta.title: Multiply your reviews today.
finalCta.subtitle: Reserve your NFC Stand at launch price. Only a handful of units left at this price.
